description: Phase 3 production hardening — kill switch, pause rules, pre-trade controls

daily_loss_pct.description: Pause if daily equity loss exceeds this percent

rolling_drawdown_pct.description: Pause if rolling drawdown exceeds this percent

abnormal_slippage_pct.description: Pause if average slippage exceeds this percent over recent fills

order_rejection_count.description: Pause if order rejections in window exceed threshold

broker_error_count.description: Pause if broker/API errors exceed threshold in window

stale_data_minutes.description: Pause if market data is older than threshold during market hours

duplicate_order_count.description: Pause if duplicate orders detected exceed threshold

heartbeat_missing_minutes.description: Pause if critical script heartbeat missing for this duration
